zh.of Hinton, St. Gelorge, Somersetshire, E: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Halsnoth Harsnett於從大約1480年到1485年出生在英國英格蘭艾可可爾斯特時，他的父親John Harsnett-13歲，母親Cyshye Beck14歲。他於1515年與Jeanette Murphy在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1565年在英國艾可可爾斯特。

zh-hans.of Hinton, St. Gelorge, Somersetshire, E: 英国英格兰薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Halsnoth Harsnett于从大约1480年到1485年出生在英国英格兰艾可可爾斯特时，他的父亲John Harsnett-13岁，母亲Cyshye Beck14岁。他于1515年与Jeanette Murphy在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1565年在英国艾可可爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Harsnett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Cork and Limerick): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAirtnéada ‘descendant of Airtnéad’, a personal name based on art ‘bear’ or ‘hero’.

variants.name: Harnett
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen, Fergus.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When John Halsnoth Harsnett was born from about 1480 to 1485, in Colchester, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Harsnett, was -13 and his mother, Cyshye Beck, was 14. He married Jeanette Murphy in 1515, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1565, in Colchester, Essex, England.

Il a épousé Jeanette Murphy en 1515, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1565, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre.

ko.of Hinton, St. Gelorge, Somersetshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지
ko.lifeSummary: John Halsnoth Harsnett(이)가 대략 1480년 부터 1485년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 코체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Harsnett(은)는 -13세였고, 그의 어머니 Cyshye Beck(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Jeanette Murphy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1565년 영국 에세스 코체스터에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Halsnoth Harsnett родился с около 1480 по 1485 в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Harsnett было -13 год, а матери, которую звали Cyshye Beck, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanette Murphy в 1515 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1565 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия.
